prophecies.q: 电脑将击败国际象棋世界冠军
prophecies.a: 「到20世纪90年代末，计算机将在国际象棋比赛中击败世界冠军。」
prophecies.q_en: Computer will defeat world chess champion
prophecies.a_en: "By the late 1990s, a computer will defeat the world chess champion."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1997年5月11日，IBM的「深蓝」超级计算机在六局比赛中以3.5比2.5击败了国际象棋世界冠军加里·卡斯帕罗夫。这是计算机首次在标准比赛条件下击败在任世界冠军。
prophecies.verdict_en: On May 11, 1997, IBM's Deep Blue supercomputer defeated world chess champion Garry Kasparov 3.5-2.5 in a six-game match. This was the first time a computer defeated a reigning world champion under standard tournament conditions.
prophecies.yearReason: 库兹韦尔在《奇点临近》等著作中系统推算得出
prophecies.yearReason_en: Kurzweil systematically calculated this in works such as "The Singularity Is Near"

prophecies.q: 便携式计算机将无处不在
prophecies.a: 「到2009年，人们将普遍使用高度便携的计算机，它们可以嵌入衣物和饰品中。」
prophecies.a_en: "By 2009, people will commonly use highly portable computers that can be embedded in clothing and accessories."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 到2009年，笔记本电脑已高度普及，iPhone（2007年发布）引领了智能手机革命。虽然计算机尚未嵌入衣物，但便携计算设备已无处不在。核心趋势判断正确。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2009, laptops were highly prevalent, and the iPhone (released 2007) had sparked the smartphone revolution. While computers weren't yet embedded in clothing, portable computing devices were ubiquitous. The core trend was correctly predicted.
prophecies.yearReason: 库兹韦尔在《奇点临近》等著作中系统推算得出
prophecies.yearReason_en: Kurzweil systematically calculated this in works such as "The Singularity Is Near"

prophecies.q: 语音识别技术将成熟并广泛应用
prophecies.a: 「到2009年，连续语音识别技术将达到实用水平，成为计算机的主要输入方式之一。」
prophecies.a_en: "By 2009, continuous speech recognition will reach practical levels and become a primary computer input method."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2009年时Dragon NaturallySpeaking等软件已能实现较好的连续语音识别，但尚未成为主流输入方式。真正的突破在2011年Siri发布后才到来。时间略有偏差，但方向正确。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2009, Dragon NaturallySpeaking and similar software achieved decent continuous speech recognition, but it wasn't yet a mainstream input method. The real breakthrough came with Siri's launch in 2011. Timing was slightly off, but the direction was correct.
prophecies.yearReason: 库兹韦尔在《奇点临近》等著作中系统推算得出
prophecies.yearReason_en: Kurzweil systematically calculated this in works such as "The Singularity Is Near"

prophecies.q: 自动驾驶汽车将出现
prophecies.a: 「到2009年，自动驾驶系统将开始出现在道路上。」
prophecies.a_en: "By 2009, self-driving systems will begin appearing on roads."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2009年时DARPA挑战赛（2005、2007年）已展示了自动驾驶原型车的可行性。谷歌自动驾驶项目于2009年启动。但自动驾驶汽车在2009年尚未真正出现在公共道路上，商业化要到2010年代中后期。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2009, DARPA challenges (2005, 2007) had demonstrated self-driving prototypes. Google's self-driving car project launched in 2009. But autonomous vehicles were not yet on public roads in 2009; commercialization came in the mid-to-late 2010s.
prophecies.yearReason: 库兹韦尔在《奇点临近》等著作中系统推算得出
prophecies.yearReason_en: Kurzweil systematically calculated this in works such as "The Singularity Is Near"

prophecies.q: 智能手机将成为全球性的随身设备
prophecies.a: 「到2019年，大多数人将随身携带功能强大的计算设备，可以进行实时语音翻译、访问全球知识库、并通过无线网络保持持续连接。」
prophecies.q_en: Smartphones will be universal personal devices
prophecies.a_en: "By 2019, most people will carry powerful computing devices capable of real-time voice translation, accessing global knowledge bases, and maintaining constant wireless connectivity."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 到2019年，全球智能手机用户超过35亿。Google翻译、Siri等已实现实时语音翻译。4G/WiFi覆盖使持续连接成为常态。智能手机完全符合库兹韦尔描述的功能。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2019, global smartphone users exceeded 3.5 billion. Google Translate, Siri, and others enabled real-time voice translation. 4G/WiFi coverage made constant connectivity the norm. Smartphones fully matched Kurzweil's described capabilities.
prophecies.yearReason: 库兹韦尔在《奇点临近》等著作中系统推算得出
prophecies.yearReason_en: Kurzweil systematically calculated this in works such as "The Singularity Is Near"

prophecies.q: 电子书将取代纸质书
prophecies.a: 「到2009年，大多数文本将在数字屏幕上阅读，纸质书和杂志将走向衰落。」
prophecies.a_en: "By 2009, most text will be read on digital screens, and paper books and magazines will decline."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2007年亚马逊发布Kindle，到2009年电子书市场快速增长。但纸质书在2009年仍占据主导地位。到2011年亚马逊电子书销量才首次超过纸质书。方向正确但时间偏早。
prophecies.verdict_en: Amazon launched Kindle in 2007, and the e-book market grew rapidly by 2009. However, paper books still dominated in 2009. Amazon e-book sales didn't surpass print until 2011. Direction correct but timing was early.
prophecies.yearReason: 库兹韦尔在《奇点临近》等著作中系统推算得出
prophecies.yearReason_en: Kurzweil systematically calculated this in works such as "The Singularity Is Near"

prophecies.q: 远程教育将革新学习方式
prophecies.a: 「到2019年，学生将主要通过与智能AI导师进行在线互动来学习。传统教室教学将显著减少。」
prophecies.a_en: "By 2019, students will primarily learn through online interaction with intelligent AI tutors. Traditional classroom instruction will decline significantly."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 到2019年，在线教育平台（Coursera、Khan Academy、Udemy等）已广泛普及，但AI导师尚未成为主流教学方式。传统课堂教学仍占主导。COVID-19疫情后（2020年）在线学习才大规模普及。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2019, online education platforms (Coursera, Khan Academy, Udemy) were widely adopted, but AI tutors were not yet mainstream. Traditional classroom instruction still dominated. Online learning only became truly widespread after COVID-19 (2020).
prophecies.yearReason: 库兹韦尔在《奇点临近》等著作中系统推算得出
prophecies.yearReason_en: Kurzweil systematically calculated this in works such as "The Singularity Is Near"

prophecies.q: 库兹韦尔关于VR眼镜的预测
prophecies.a: 到2019年，人们将普遍佩戴轻便的虚拟现实眼镜，可以在其中体验逼真的三维环境。
prophecies.a_en: By 2019, people will commonly wear lightweight virtual reality glasses that provide realistic 3D environments.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2019年VR头显已有多款产品（Oculus Quest、HTC Vive、PSVR），但仍较笨重且未成为日常佩戴设备。2023年Apple Vision Pro的发布更接近库兹韦尔的设想，但价格高昂且未普及。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2019, multiple VR headsets existed (Oculus Quest, HTC Vive, PSVR) but remained bulky and not daily-wear devices. Apple Vision Pro (2023) came closer to Kurzweil's vision but was expensive and not mainstream.
prophecies.yearReason: 库兹韦尔1999年《心灵机器的时代》中明确预测2019年VR眼镜普及
prophecies.yearReason_en: Kurzweil explicitly predicted widespread VR glasses by 2019 in 'The Age of Spiritual Machines' (1999)

prophecies.q: 库兹韦尔关于无线互联网无处不在的预测
prophecies.a: 到2009年，高速无线互联网将无处不在，人们可以在任何地方上网。
prophecies.q_en: Kurzweil's prediction about ubiquitous wireless internet
prophecies.a_en: By 2009, high-speed wireless internet will be ubiquitous, and people will be able to access the internet anywhere.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2009年3G网络已在全球主要城市覆盖，WiFi热点遍布咖啡馆、机场、酒店。iPhone（2007年发布）和Android手机使移动互联网成为日常。虽然覆盖率尚未达到100%，但「随时随地上网」已基本实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2009, 3G networks covered major cities worldwide, and WiFi hotspots were ubiquitous in cafes, airports, and hotels. The iPhone (2007) and Android phones made mobile internet routine. While coverage wasn't 100%, 'anytime anywhere internet' was largely achieved.
prophecies.yearReason: 库兹韦尔1999年《心灵机器的时代》中预测2009年无线互联网普及
prophecies.yearReason_en: Kurzweil predicted ubiquitous wireless internet by 2009 in 'The Age of Spiritual Machines' (1999)

prophecies.q: 库兹韦尔关于实时语言翻译设备的预测
prophecies.a: 到2019年，便携式设备将能够实时翻译多种语言的口语对话，消除语言障碍。
prophecies.q_en: Kurzweil's prediction about real-time language translation devices
prophecies.a_en: By 2019, portable devices will translate spoken conversations in multiple languages in real-time, eliminating language barriers.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2019年Google Translate已支持100+种语言的实时翻译，Google Pixel Buds提供了实时口语翻译功能。但翻译质量仍有限，无法完全消除语言障碍。2023年后LLM的出现大幅提升了翻译质量。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2019, Google Translate supported 100+ languages in real-time, and Google Pixel Buds offered real-time spoken translation. But quality was still limited, not fully eliminating language barriers. Post-2023 LLMs significantly improved translation quality.
prophecies.yearReason: 库兹韦尔1999年预测2019年实时翻译设备，Google Pixel Buds于2017年推出
prophecies.yearReason_en: Kurzweil predicted real-time translation devices by 2019 in 1999; Google Pixel Buds launched in 2017

prophecies.q: 库兹韦尔关于计算设备隐形化的预测
prophecies.a: 到2019年，计算设备将嵌入衣物、眼镜和环境中，变得「隐形」。人们将不再需要携带独立的计算设备。
prophecies.a_en: By 2019, computing devices will be embedded in clothing, glasses, and the environment, becoming 'invisible'. People will no longer need to carry separate computing devices.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2019年智能手表（Apple Watch）、智能音箱（Alexa/Google Home）、物联网设备已将计算嵌入日常环境。但人们仍依赖智能手机作为主要计算设备。完全「隐形」的计算尚未实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2019, smartwatches (Apple Watch), smart speakers (Alexa/Google Home), and IoT devices embedded computing into daily environments. But people still relied on smartphones as primary computing devices. Fully 'invisible' computing hasn't been realized.
prophecies.yearReason: 库兹韦尔1999年预测2019年计算设备嵌入环境中变得隐形
prophecies.yearReason_en: Kurzweil predicted computing devices would become invisible by embedding in environments by 2019

prophecies.q: 计算机将通过图灵测试
prophecies.a: 「到2029年，计算机将达到人类水平的智能，能够通过图灵测试。」
prophecies.q_en: Computers will pass the Turing test
prophecies.a_en: "By 2029, computers will achieve human-level intelligence and pass the Turing test."
prophecies.yearReason: 库兹韦尔在《奇点临近》等著作中系统推算得出
prophecies.yearReason_en: Kurzweil systematically calculated this in works such as "The Singularity Is Near"

prophecies.q: 虚拟现实将达到完全沉浸
prophecies.a: 「到2029年，虚拟现实将达到完全沉浸式的水平，视觉、听觉和触觉体验将与真实世界无法区分。」
prophecies.a_en: "By 2029, virtual reality will be fully immersive, with visual, auditory, and tactile experiences indistinguishable from the real world."
prophecies.yearReason: 库兹韦尔在《奇点临近》等著作中系统推算得出
prophecies.yearReason_en: Kurzweil systematically calculated this in works such as "The Singularity Is Near"

prophecies.q: 太阳能将满足全球能源需求
prophecies.a: 「到2029年，太阳能将能满足全球全部能源需求。太阳能产出每两年翻一番，这一指数增长将使太阳能在2020年代末成为主导能源。」
prophecies.q_en: Solar energy will meet global needs
prophecies.a_en: "By 2029, solar energy will be capable of meeting all global energy needs. Solar output doubles every two years, and this exponential growth will make solar the dominant energy source by the late 2020s."
prophecies.yearReason: 库兹韦尔在《奇点临近》等著作中系统推算得出
prophecies.yearReason_en: Kurzweil systematically calculated this in works such as "The Singularity Is Near"

prophecies.q: 3D打印将变革制造业
prophecies.a: 「到2019年，3D打印技术将能够打印衣服、电子产品等各类物品，并开始取代传统制造业。」
prophecies.a_en: "By 2019, 3D printing will be able to print clothing, electronics, and various objects, and will begin replacing traditional manufacturing."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 到2019年，3D打印在原型制造、医疗植入物、航空零部件等领域取得重要进展。但打印衣服和电子产品仍处于实验阶段，远未取代传统制造业。Formlabs、Stratasys等公司推动了工业级应用。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2019, 3D printing made significant advances in prototyping, medical implants, and aerospace parts. However, printing clothing and electronics remained experimental, far from replacing traditional manufacturing. Companies like Formlabs and Stratasys drove industrial applications.
prophecies.yearReason: 库兹韦尔在《奇点临近》等著作中系统推算得出
prophecies.yearReason_en: Kurzweil systematically calculated this in works such as "The Singularity Is Near"

prophecies.q: 纳米机器人将进入人体血液
prophecies.a: 「到2030年代，纳米机器人将能够进入人体血液，修复细胞损伤、消灭病原体、逆转衰老过程。」
prophecies.a_en: "By the 2030s, nanobots will be able to enter the human bloodstream, repairing cell damage, destroying pathogens, and reversing the aging process."
prophecies.yearReason: 库兹韦尔在《奇点临近》等著作中系统推算得出
prophecies.yearReason_en: Kurzweil systematically calculated this in works such as "The Singularity Is Near"

prophecies.q: 非生物智能将超越生物智能
prophecies.a: 「到2045年，非生物智能将比今天所有人类智能的总和强大十亿倍。这就是奇点——技术变革如此迅速和深刻，以至于代表人类历史的一个断裂。」
prophecies.q_en: Non-biological intelligence will surpass biological intelligence
prophecies.a_en: "By 2045, non-biological intelligence will be a billion times more powerful than all human intelligence today. This is the Singularity — technological change so rapid and profound that it represents a rupture in the fabric of human history."
prophecies.yearReason: 库兹韦尔在《奇点临近》等著作中系统推算得出
prophecies.yearReason_en: Kurzweil systematically calculated this in works such as "The Singularity Is Near"

prophecies.q: 人类将与AI融合
prophecies.a: 「到2045年，人类将通过脑机接口与人工智能融合，极大地扩展认知能力。生物智能和非生物智能之间的界限将变得模糊。」
prophecies.a_en: "By 2045, humans will merge with artificial intelligence through brain-computer interfaces, vastly expanding cognitive abilities. The line between biological and non-biological intelligence will blur."
prophecies.yearReason: 库兹韦尔在《奇点临近》等著作中系统推算得出
prophecies.yearReason_en: Kurzweil systematically calculated this in works such as "The Singularity Is Near"

prophecies.q: AI将辅助医疗诊断
prophecies.a: 「到2020年代初，AI系统将能够在多数医学影像诊断任务中达到甚至超越人类医生的水平。」
prophecies.a_en: "By the early 2020s, AI systems will match or exceed human doctors in most medical imaging diagnostic tasks."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 到2023年，AI在医学影像诊断领域已取得显著成就。Google Health的AI在乳腺X光检测中超越放射科医生，多项研究显示AI在皮肤癌、糖尿病视网膜病变、肺结节等影像诊断中达到或超越专家水平。FDA已批准数百个AI医疗影像算法。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2023, AI achieved remarkable results in medical imaging. Google Health's AI outperformed radiologists in mammography. Multiple studies showed AI matching or exceeding expert-level performance in skin cancer, diabetic retinopathy, and lung nodule detection. The FDA approved hundreds of AI medical imaging algorithms.
prophecies.yearReason: 库兹韦尔在《奇点临近》等著作中系统推算得出
prophecies.yearReason_en: Kurzweil systematically calculated this in works such as "The Singularity Is Near"

prophecies.q: 自动驾驶汽车将普及
prophecies.a: 「到2020年代末，自动驾驶汽车将成为主流交通方式，人类驾驶将逐步被限制。」
prophecies.a_en: "By the late 2020s, self-driving cars will become the mainstream mode of transportation, and human driving will be progressively restricted."
prophecies.yearReason: 库兹韦尔在《奇点临近》等著作中系统推算得出
prophecies.yearReason_en: Kurzweil systematically calculated this in works such as "The Singularity Is Near"

prophecies.q: 人类寿命将大幅延长
prophecies.a: 「到2030年代中期，医学纳米技术和生物技术的突破将使人类每年延长一年以上的预期寿命，实现'长寿逃逸速度'。」
prophecies.q_en: Human lifespan will be significantly extended
prophecies.a_en: "By the mid-2030s, breakthroughs in medical nanotechnology and biotechnology will extend human life expectancy by more than one year per year, achieving 'longevity escape velocity'."
prophecies.yearReason: 库兹韦尔在《奇点临近》等著作中系统推算得出
prophecies.yearReason_en: Kurzweil systematically calculated this in works such as "The Singularity Is Near"

prophecies.q: 库兹韦尔关于自动驾驶汽车主流化的预测
prophecies.a: 到2029年，自动驾驶汽车将成为主流交通方式。人类驾驶将逐渐被限制甚至在高速公路上被禁止。
prophecies.q_en: Kurzweil's prediction about mainstream self-driving cars
prophecies.a_en: By 2029, self-driving cars will be mainstream transportation. Human driving will gradually be restricted and possibly banned on highways.
prophecies.yearReason: 库兹韦尔2005年《奇点临近》中预测2029年自动驾驶汽车主流化
prophecies.yearReason_en: Kurzweil predicted mainstream self-driving cars by 2029 in 'The Singularity Is Near' (2005)
